title: I like not spending money on food

transcript.text: I'm really liking practicing not spending any money on food.
It makes me feel very free.
You can, you know, if you don't have to leave the house
And you just get to be in the peace of your own house.
Somebody gave me a website called $5 or something
Where people get on there and they offer certain services for $5.
And if you can do that, even if you don't make much money,
You can hang around at home and do your work.
And not spending any money sets you free.
And, I mean, I'm starting to learn, and I learned this from living in my car,
That not spending much money on food is really cool.
And I'm starting to realize, like, how much of a slave I was
To different kinds of snacks and things, which would just drain my money.
I mean, I could go out today and get the munchies
And buy, like, a $3 bag of potato chips
And then, like, spend $2 more on candy
And then get, like, two more bucks on a soda.
And that's, like, you know, I could spend $10 just like that every day
And actually do more harm to my body
Than just eating, you know, pure oatmeal and fruit in the morning,
Rice and a can of vegetables for lunch,
And then, like, rice and a can of beans for dinner.
And that's a total of, like, you know, $3 or something, you know.
That's, like, as much money as I would spend on a couple bags of candy, you know.
And I'm way healthier.
I'm not, I'm not, because it's kind of, like, candy and snacks is kind of like drugs.
You get addicted to it, and then you kind of feel this emptiness in your life.
You're like, oh, my God, I just crave, I just crave.
It's like drugs, you know.
It's, and it's unhealthy for you, and it's unnecessary, and it's just,
I love going day after day after day and just not spending anything,
Just living totally for free.
And I feel great physically, especially when I exercise some.
Like, when I work on my computer, I've been riding on my bike a little bit.
Not so much today, but, yeah, but just, like, eating, and, like, cans of food is so cheap.
In Dallas, I was spending, like, 70 cents for a can of vegetables, you know, and fruit.
And you can go to the Sister Carmen and get free food, which is enough food for a few days.
And even the food that's tasty, like, you know, the bagged, like, spiced food, and it's free.
And it's, I love it, and it's, it's like a, it's, I feel like if I was, like, really rich,
I would never would have discovered this.
And so I'm kind of glad that I had to.
It's forcing me to focus, and it's making me feel really empowered by not having to spend money on food, you know.
I've got, I only have, like, 15 cans of food in there.
And I'm looking, I'm, like, instead of being, like, oh, no, only 50 cans of food, I'm going to have to get food.
So I'm, like, oh, cool, 50 cans of food.
That's, like, another week's worth of food, man.
I'm awesome.
I'm here if I'm good for another week.
So it's really cool.
I love it.
And, yeah, in my daily vlogs, just look in the comments section on how much money I spent.
And I just, it's like a game.
I want to just see how long I can go without spending money.
And just look, day after day, it just says zero.
Zero money.
Zero money.
Zero money.
Not spending any money.
And if I'm making, like, say, making a bunch of YouTube videos, and I make, like, eight bucks a day on YouTube videos,
And I'm spending less than what I'm food, like, I don't even have to, like, that's my job, you know.
Like, I could be richer making $8 a day than somebody who makes $100 a day,
Because I only spend $3 a day, and maybe that person who makes $100 a day is spending $150 a day,
You know, going out to eat and driving all over and da-da-da-da-da-da-da.
You know, so in that sense, you know, maybe, like, a millionaire is actually poorer than a homeless person.
A homeless person has more, feels more abundance in their heart than the rich guy is always worrying about,
Oh, no, am I going to be able to pay all these bills?
So it's a really cool practice, and I recommend trying it also for health reasons, you know,
Living, not just eating pure food without all the condiments and stuff makes you feel really good physically,
And you're not spending anything.
And, you know, if you have to record it, that would be, I think it would be a cool thing to do,
Especially if you could record it and vlog about it and, like, you know, prove to other people,
Because you can inspire other people to be like that, too.
But, yeah, I'm loving it.
I'm, like, you know, because I'm living in a peaceful scenario, a nice-looking house,
And that's all I need.
I'm good.
I love it, so, yeah.
And I like it, I like vlogging about it, too, because I'm kind of, kind of keeping track of it.
